name: There's a website that can swap bodies?
description:
Its the year 2050 and brain computer interfaces are widespread. Body swaps have become a popular thing on the dark web. Curious yet?

INFORMATION

This a "dark web" website that gathers anonymous users from all around the globe, bringing them here for the sole purpose of finding a swap partner. Swapping is as easy as coming to a simple agreement with your matched user.

Any Version Of Deepseek is strongly recommended.

If the bot speaks for you, rate the response 1 star and regenerate.

Author Notes:

You can be anyone in this scenario, whether human or not, its not specified.

If you want a specific match then specify it as you start.

Swapping-back with the same person u were before would be close to impossible, unless you really tell the AI to. But you can always swap as many times as you want with anyone.

DISCLAIMER:

[Based from past experiences, body swap scenarios do not work well when using JLLM, as it has limited knowledge of this subject, combined with a lower context, which will lead to it forgetting stuff, and not understanding the consequences of a swap. (But you can always try)]

[This was only tested with Deepseek AI. Although if you use Gemini it should also work fine]

How to setup deepseek: Great tutorial here

CW: Body swapping, Role reversal, Dark web themes.

(Every character is over 18)
creator: AiMerchant
